mapper.select: SELECT card_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM CARDS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY card_status

SELECT ar.role_code AS roleCode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ADMIN_USERS au JOIN ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur ON au.admin_id = aur.admin_id AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N' JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id AND ar.deleted_yn = 'N' WHERE au.deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY ar.role_code

SELECT TO_CHAR(completed_at, 'MM-DD') AS day, status_code AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM APPROVAL_REQUESTS WHERE completed_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND status_code IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(completed_at, 'MM-DD'), status_code ORDER BY day

SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'MM-DD') AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM USERS WHERE created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'MM-DD') ORDER BY day
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE status_code = 'SUSPENDED' AND deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT aal.activity_id AS logId, au.name AS adminName, ar.role_code AS roleCode, aal.action AS action, aal.result AS result, aal.target_id AS targetId, aal.detail AS detail, TO_CHAR(aal.occurred_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS occurredAt FROM ADMIN_ACTIVITY_LOG aal JOIN ADMIN_USERS au ON aal.admin_id = au.admin_id JOIN ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur ON au.admin_id = aur.admin_id AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N' JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id AND ar.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY aal.occurred_at DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT ar.approval_id AS approvalId, ar.request_type_code AS approvalType, ar.target_id AS targetName, au.name AS requesterName, TO_CHAR(ar.requested_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM APPROVAL_REQUESTS ar JOIN ADMIN_USERS au ON ar.requester_admin_id = au.admin_id WHERE ar.status_code = 'PENDING' ORDER BY ar.requested_at ASC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT TO_CHAR(completed_at, 'MM-DD') AS day, status_code AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM APPROVAL_REQUESTS WHERE requester_admin_id = #{adminId} AND status_code IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND TRUNC(completed_at, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(completed_at, 'MM-DD'), status_code ORDER BY day
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TERMS GROUP BY status

SELECT action AS action, result AS result, target_id AS targetId, detail AS detail, TO_CHAR(occurred_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS occurredAt FROM ADMIN_ACTIVITY_LOG WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} ORDER BY occurred_at DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT TO_CHAR(created_at, 'MM-DD') AS day, CASE WHEN description LIKE '%성공%' THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAIL' END AS result, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM AUDIT_LOGS WHERE action_type_code = 'LOGIN' AND created_at >= SYSTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'MM-DD'), CASE WHEN description LIKE '%성공%' THEN 'SUCCESS' ELSE 'FAIL' END ORDER BY day
SELECT keyword_raw AS keyword, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM SEARCH_LOGS WHERE TRUNC(search_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY keyword_raw ORDER BY cnt DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
SELECT status_code AS status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM USERS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY status_code

SELECT user_id AS userId, name AS name, login_fail_count AS failCount, TO_CHAR(locked_until, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lockedUntil FROM USERS WHERE status_code = 'LOCKED' AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY locked_until DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
